title: cymopterus fendleri var. newberryi
intro: Cymopterus fendleri var. newberryi, also known as Newberry's desert parsley, is a rare and endemic variety of the desert parsley plant that is native to the southwestern United States. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it beneficial for treating various health conditions such as fever, sore throats, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Newberry's desert parsley include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and act as an expectorant to relieve congestion. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by infusing the leaves and stems in hot water or a solvent like ethanol to extract its medicinal compounds.
